_comment: Universal dependency hygiene rules. Catches imports of banned packages at write-time. Complement to Sentinel dep-guard.sh (install-time) and audit-deps (commit-time).

rules.message: axios is banned -- 9+ CVEs, state-sponsored supply chain compromise (2026-03-31). Use native fetch() or ky instead. See: sentinel/data/banned-packages.json
request is banned -- deprecated since 2020, unmaintained, multiple unpatched CVEs. Use native fetch() or got instead.
moment is deprecated (2020). 300KB+ with no tree-shaking. Use date-fns, dayjs, or luxon instead.
event-stream is banned -- supply chain attack (2018) injected cryptocurrency theft via flatmap-stream. Use Node.js streams API or Highland.js.
colors is banned -- maintainer sabotage (2022) injected infinite loop. Use chalk, picocolors, or kleur instead.
faker is banned -- maintainer sabotage (2022). Use @faker-js/faker (community fork) instead.
node-uuid is deprecated. Use uuid package or native crypto.randomUUID() (Node 19+).
pycrypto (Crypto) is banned -- unmaintained since 2014, heap overflow CVEs. Use pycryptodome (from Cryptodome) or cryptography instead.
python-jwt is banned -- authentication bypass CVE-2022-39227. Use PyJWT, python-jose, or authlib instead.
dgrijalva/jwt-go is unmaintained. Use github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5 (community fork) instead.
openssl crate wraps C OpenSSL and inherits its CVE surface. Consider rustls or ring for pure-Rust TLS.
